title: Overcoming Urinary Calculus with 7 Effective Herbal Tinctures for Men
description: Berberis vulgaris tinctures have been traditionally used to help alleviate urinary calculi, also known as kidney stones. The tincture's effectiveness can be attributed to its high content of berberine, a compound that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Berberine also has a mild diuretic effect, which helps to increase urine production and reduce the concentration of minerals that can form stones.
